title: Timeless Engineers
description: this is a pack with a mix of tech mods to be used on a server. main mods are: AIT, Create Mod, Simple Radios (Simple Voice Chat addon)
body:
Timeless Engineers is a tech modpack with other mods and is (hopefully) stable enough to be used on servers.

the main mods are: AIT, Create Mod (with addons), Simple Voice Chat (with Simple Radios and Simple Voice Radios)

this modpack is designed for a server with mods chosen by people on the AmbleLab discord server.

**IMPORTANT INFO FOR RUNNING WITHOUT CRASHES**
Modpack needs atleast 4032 MB of ram to be stable in a singleplayer world (will test multiplayer soon)
